gates.requirement: Runtime proves agent instance identity and replay resistance
Runtime proves sponsor-scoped revocable agent authority
Runtime proves high-consequence actions preflight before mutation
Runtime proves AI/app answers preserve permission/freshness/qualification state
Runtime proves run traces include read/query/assumption/tool/policy/output/blocked-action sets
Runtime proves context handoff cannot transfer authority
Runtime proves world-model state cannot become Compliance state/current state
Runtime proves EvidenceNeed/ObservationRequest deduplication, burden, and consequence rules
Runtime proves offline contractor uploads remain candidate/review-bound after authority changes
Runtime proves SharingGrant, redaction, revocation, and permission-limited answers
Two independent agents pass compatibility and hostile handoff tests
All 22 hostile break tests execute and pass with expected blocked-action traces
